prompt: A Textual Graphics and Typography composition using the silhouette shape from the reference image, filled with expressive letterforms and design elements.
prompt_refined: Generate a textual graphics and typography composition where the central form is the complete silhouette of the woman from image 1. This silhouette must be intricately filled with dynamic, expressive letterforms and diverse abstract typographic design elements, forming a cohesive and visually impactful artwork.
objects: complete silhouette of the woman from image 1
diverse abstract typographic design elements filling the silhouette
